name: Michael Franks
description: American recording artist; singer and songwriter
abstract: Michael Franks (born September 18, 1944) is an American singer and songwriter. He has recorded with a variety of well-known artists, such as Peggy Lee, Dan Hicks, Patti Austin, Art Garfunkel, Brenda Russell, Claus Ogerman, Joe Sample, and David Sanborn.

concerts.label: A Decade of Beauty: A Benefit for PETA (People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals)

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: I had some Michael Franks records... And then I learned some Michael Franks songs.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]
